step_by_step_thinking:
Agree / Disagree & New Reason/Counterargument if applicable.
I agree with the conclusion that silicone impression material is the hardest to remove. One important aspect to add is the time factor; since silicones cure over extended periods and develop strong bonds, their removal might require multiple attempts and prolonged exposure times, increasing discomfort and stress for the patient.

**(B)**
